<div aria-label="Just please let me know ahead of time so I'm not waiting... :)" class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;"><span style="font-family: inherit;">Just please let me know ahead of time so I'm not waiting... <img alt="" class="_1ift _2560 img" src="/images/imported/static-xx-fbcdn-net/1f642-95ee8d2831d9.png" style="border: 0px; display: inline-block; height: 16px; margin: 0px 1px; pointer-events: none; vertical-align: middle; width: 16px;" /></span></span></div>
<div class="_4kf7 preview" style="bottom: -13px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; padding: 0px 2px; position: absolute; right: 0px; text-align: right; z-index: 1;">
<div class="_7ef9" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="Shelley Hunter" style="display: inline-flex; font-family: inherit; margin-left: 5px;">
<div class="_aou" role="button" style="align-items: center; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 10px; bottom: -15px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 0px 2px 4px; color: #626262; display: flex; font-family: inherit; justify-content: center;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_4kf5" style="align-items: center; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; height: 20px; justify-content: center; line-height: 0; margin-left: 0px; min-width: 20px; z-index: 1;"><span style="font-family: inherit;"><img alt="" class="_1ift _5m3a img" src="/images/imported/static-xx-fbcdn-net/1f622-9da7550c9ce1.png" style="border: 0px; display: inline-block; height: 1em; margin: 0px 1px; pointer-events: none; vertical-align: middle;" /></span></span><span class="_4kf5 _4kf6" style="align-items: center; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; display: flex; font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; height: 20px; justify-content: center; line-height: 0; margin-left: -5px; margin-right: -3px; min-width: 20px; padding: 4px;">1</span></div>

<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_5z-5 _3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="2:47 PM" data-tooltip-position="right" id="js_ik" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 4px 1.3em 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px 10px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 351.398px; top: 32.6818px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"><div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px 5px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="Planning to be working on the Letter anyway if you're too busy, but I'm feeling a little fragile so a heads up would help. Thanks." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">Planning to be working on the Letter anyway if you're too busy, but I'm feeling a little fragile so a heads up would help. Thanks.</span></div>
<div class="_4kf7 preview" style="bottom: -13px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; padding: 0px 2px; position: absolute; right: 0px; text-align: right; z-index: 1;">
<div class="_7ef9" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="Shelley Hunter" style="display: inline-flex; font-family: inherit; margin-left: 5px;">
<div class="_aou" role="button" style="align-items: center; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 10px; bottom: -15px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 0px 2px 4px; color: #626262; display: flex; font-family: inherit; justify-content: center;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_4kf5" style="align-items: center; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; height: 20px; justify-content: center; line-height: 0; margin-left: 0px; min-width: 20px; z-index: 1;"><span style="font-family: inherit;"><img alt="" class="_1ift _5m3a img" src="/images/imported/static-xx-fbcdn-net/1f622-9da7550c9ce1.png" style="border: 0px; display: inline-block; height: 1em; margin: 0px 1px; pointer-events: none; vertical-align: middle;" /></span></span><span class="_4kf5 _4kf6" style="align-items: center; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; display: flex; font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; height: 20px; justify-content: center; line-height: 0; margin-left: -5px; margin-right: -3px; min-width: 20px; padding: 4px;">1</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<h4 class="_497p _2lpt" style="color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); display: block; font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; margin: 12px 0px 12px 20px; padding: 0px; text-align: center; text-transform: uppercase;">
<time class="_3oh-" style="user-select: text;">7:31 PM</time></h4>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
<div class="_1t_p clearfix" style="font-family: inherit; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">
<h5 aria-label="Darrell" class="_ih3 accessible_elem _-ne" style="clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; height: 1px; line-height: 1.28; margin: 0px 0px 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 0px 0px 12px; position: absolute; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; width: 1px;">
Darrell</h5>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="7:31 PM" data-tooltip-position="right" id="js_jc" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 351.398px; top: 146.136px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"><div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px 5px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="You gave Scott our night without any notice... Huh... I will have to go journal my way through this one instead of putting my thoughts here. I'm feeling a little cast aside now to be honest. I'm just going to delete this calendar event so I don't get my hopes up.

I really do want you to live and enjoy life and embrace this season. I just took that calendar event a little more seriously than you did I guess. 

I'm sorry... I think I'm struggling with the friends thing.

I'll go work my way through it, I'll be fine. I just need to process." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">You gave Scott our night without any notice... Huh... I will have to go journal my way through this one instead of putting my thoughts here. I'm feeling a little cast aside now to be honest. I'm just going to delete this calendar event so I don't get my hopes up.

I really do want you to live and enjoy life and embrace this season. I just took that calendar event a little more seriously than you did I guess. 

I'm sorry... I think I'm struggling with the friends thing.

I'll go work my way through it, I'll be fine. I just need to process.</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<h4 class="_497p _2lpt" style="color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); display: block; font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; margin: 12px 0px 12px 20px; padding: 0px; text-align: center; text-transform: uppercase;">
<time class="_3oh-" style="user-select: text;">9:02 PM</time></h4>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
<div class="_1t_p clearfix" style="font-family: inherit; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_1t_q" style="font-family: inherit;">
<div class="_4ldz _1t_r" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="Shelley Hunter" data-tooltip-position="left" style="bottom: 2px; font-family: inherit; height: 32px; max-height: 28px; max-width: 28px; position: absolute; width: 32px;">

</div>

<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>
</span></span><a class="_6e6n" href="https://www.facebook.com/messages/t/100006410115712#" style="color: black; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><blockquote class="_pye" style="color: #828282; display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; margin: 6px 0px; max-width: 93%; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding-left: 10px; position: relative; white-space: pre-wrap;">
<div class="_pyf" style="background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); border-radius: 1px; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; height: 32px; margin-left: -10px; position: absolute; width: 2px;">
</div>
<div class="_4k7e _4ik4 _4ik5" style="-webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; display: -webkit-box; float: none; font-family: inherit; line-height: 16px; max-height: 32px; overflow: hidden; white-space: normal;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;"><span style="font-family: inherit;">Planning to be working on the Letter anyway if you're too busy, but I'm feeling a little fragile so a heads up would help. Thanks.</span></span></div>
</blockquote>
</a><div aria-label="I could tell you were." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">I could tell you were.</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
<div class="_1t_p clearfix" style="font-family: inherit; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">
<h5 aria-label="Darrell" class="_ih3 accessible_elem _-ne" style="clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; height: 1px; line-height: 1.28; margin: 0px 0px 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 0px 0px 12px; position: absolute; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; width: 1px;">
Darrell</h5>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="9:07 PM" data-tooltip-position="right" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 351.398px; top: 67.5909px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"><div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px 5px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="I'm hurting right now. It's not your fault. I'm aware I'm not seeing things accurately. But I'm really hurt. I don't know what to do with it, and the lies are louder than the truth tonight. I took a walk and prayed and it helped... But... Well... It doesn't matter. I can tell you more later if you want to hear it. I won't bother you right now." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">I'm hurting right now. It's not your fault. I'm aware I'm not seeing things accurately. But I'm really hurt. I don't know what to do with it, and the lies are louder than the truth tonight. I took a walk and prayed and it helped... But... Well... It doesn't matter. I can tell you more later if you want to hear it. I won't bother you right now.</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
<div class="_1t_p clearfix" style="font-family: inherit; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_1t_q" style="font-family: inherit;">
<div class="_4ldz _1t_r" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="Shelley Hunter" data-tooltip-position="left" style="bottom: 2px; font-family: inherit; height: 32px; max-height: 28px; max-width: 28px; position: absolute; width: 32px;">
<div class="_4ld-" style="align-items: center; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; font-family: inherit; height: 32px; justify-content: center; max-height: 28px; max-width: 28px; overflow: hidden; width: 32px;">
<img alt="Shelley Hunter" class="img" height="32" src="https://scontent.fhhr1-2.fna.fbcdn.net/v/t1.0-1/p80x80/60337502_2394622840761363_1340972915335626752_n.jpg?_nc_cat=110&amp;_nc_eui2=AeHmbXE7L0lgFFYDODVHx8NF3J8UUhTTx9rPdxkYN5yiPsVz7kkXHckOta2pxM2bgfXc_L_PqmmNX-B2-WpJ0wHYvnjNtfGD_h-ypvUeTAzM2Q&amp;_nc_oc=AQkQXNEcqRlhSupXmIEqMLZhbPA2UDCR5NOJc7U6jeGFmV9f20n8mYd16cv_MopArmXX909LCvH1xz59fjO8wahQ&amp;_nc_ht=scontent.fhhr1-2.fna&amp;oh=78ca9f95bc9177a4d46c134ddf7c4e54&amp;oe=5D65436A" style="border: 0px; max-height: 28px; max-width: 28px; object-fit: cover;" width="32" /></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">
<h5 aria-label="***Shelley Renea Fox***" class="_ih3 _-ne" style="color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; height: 0px; line-height: 1.28; margin: 0px 0px 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 0px 0px 12px; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;"></span></h5>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _29_7 direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_5z-5 _3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="9:16 PM" data-tooltip-position="left" id="js_3t" style="background-color: #f1f0f0; border-radius: 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: left; color: black; float: left; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px 10px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: left; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="display: flex; font-family: inherit; left: 351.398px; position: absolute; top: 102.5px; transform: translate(10%, -50%); width: 110px;"><div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px 5px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="This dude just bring up a good conversation for me to message Scott about it cuz I wanted to know you're my benchmark and some things like that. So I already sent him two messages about it and spoke to him about it but I didn't mean to give you a heads-up in more of a warning! The fact I thought about it three or four different times today and then the day got away from me with the different ministry things I was volunteering for or the newness of kind of the relationship or how to incorporate certain things" class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">This dude just bring up a good conversation for me to message Scott about it cuz I wanted to know you're my benchmark and some things like that. So I already sent him two messages about it and spoke to him about it but I didn't mean to give you a heads-up in more of a warning! The fact I thought about it three or four different times today and then the day got away from me with the different ministry things I was volunteering for or the newness of kind of the relationship or how to incorporate certain things</span></div>
<div class="_4kf7 preview" style="bottom: -13px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; left: 0px; padding: 0px 2px; position: absolute; right: 0px; text-align: right; z-index: 1;">
<div class="_7ef9" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="Darrell G Wolfe" style="display: inline-flex; font-family: inherit; margin-left: 5px;">
<div class="_aou" role="button" style="align-items: center; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 10px; bottom: -15px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 0px 2px 4px; color: #626262; display: flex; font-family: inherit; justify-content: center;" tabindex="0">

</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
<div class="_1t_p clearfix" style="font-family: inherit; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_1t_q" style="font-family: inherit;">

<h5 aria-label="***Shelley Renea Fox***" class="_ih3 _-ne" style="color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; height: 0px; line-height: 1.28; margin: 0px 0px 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 0px 0px 12px; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;"></span></h5>

</div>

</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="But I do not want it to be a pain but also know it is not just about me." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">But I do not want it to be a pain but also know it is not just about me.</span></div>

<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _29_7 direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_5z-5 _3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="9:19 PM" data-tooltip-position="left" id="js_4b" style="background-color: #f1f0f0; border-radius: 4px 1.3em 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: left; color: black; float: left; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px 10px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: left; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="display: flex; font-family: inherit; left: 351.398px; position: absolute; top: 67.5909px; transform: translate(10%, -50%); width: 110px;"><div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px 5px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="Go be with Daddy and know that you have a place in my heart even if it is not the one understood or wanted fully.
But daddy told you friend was this season and I know there are several reasons why.

I think you know that also." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">Go be with Daddy and know that you have a place in my heart even if it is not the one understood or wanted fully.
But daddy told you friend was this season and I know there are several reasons why.

I think you know that also.</span></div>
<div class="_4kf7 preview" style="bottom: -13px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; left: 0px; padding: 0px 2px; position: absolute; right: 0px; text-align: right; z-index: 1;">

<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">
<h5 aria-label="Darrell" class="_ih3 accessible_elem _-ne" style="clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; height: 1px; line-height: 1.28; margin: 0px 0px 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 0px 0px 12px; position: absolute; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; width: 1px;">
Darrell</h5>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="9:19 PM" data-tooltip-position="right" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 351.398px; top: 41.4091px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"><div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px 5px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="Today was kind of a final straw for me, emotionally.

I can tell you about it now by text if you want, but you're probably still busy." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">Today was kind of a final straw for me, emotionally.

I can tell you about it now by text if you want, but you're probably still busy.</span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
<div class="_1t_p clearfix" style="font-family: inherit; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_1t_q" style="font-family: inherit;">

<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">
<h5 aria-label="***Shelley Renea Fox***" class="_ih3 _-ne" style="color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; height: 0px; line-height: 1.28; margin: 0px 0px 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 0px 0px 12px; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;"></span></h5>

</div>

</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="Go ahead. I can hear you." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">Go ahead. I can hear you.</span></div>
<div class="_4kf7 preview" style="bottom: -13px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; left: 0px; padding: 0px 2px; position: absolute; right: 0px; text-align: right; z-index: 1;">

<div class="_aou" role="button" style="align-items: center; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 10px; bottom: -15px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 0px 2px 4px; color: #626262; display: flex; font-family: inherit; justify-content: center;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_4kf5" style="align-items: center; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; height: 20px; justify-content: center; line-height: 0; margin-left: 0px; min-width: 20px; z-index: 1;"><span style="font-family: inherit;"><img alt="" class="_1ift _5m3a img" src="/images/imported/static-xx-fbcdn-net/1f44d-ce7935d3053d.png" style="border: 0px; display: inline-block; height: 1em; margin: 0px 1px; pointer-events: none; vertical-align: middle;" /></span></span><span class="_4kf5 _4kf6 _fy2" style="align-items: center; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; color: #0084ff; display: flex; font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; height: 20px; justify-content: center; line-height: 0; margin-left: -5px; margin-right: -3px; min-width: 20px; padding: 4px;">1</span></div>

</div>
</div>
<span class="_4jzq _jf4 _jf5" style="bottom: 0px; clear: both; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 0px; position: absolute; right: -18px;"><img alt="Seen by Shelley Hunter at 9:19 PM" class="_jf2 img" src="https://scontent.fhhr1-2.fna.fbcdn.net/v/t1.0-1/p80x80/60337502_2394622840761363_1340972915335626752_n.jpg?_nc_cat=110&amp;_nc_eui2=AeHmbXE7L0lgFFYDODVHx8NF3J8UUhTTx9rPdxkYN5yiPsVz7kkXHckOta2pxM2bgfXc_L_PqmmNX-B2-WpJ0wHYvnjNtfGD_h-ypvUeTAzM2Q&amp;_nc_oc=AQkQXNEcqRlhSupXmIEqMLZhbPA2UDCR5NOJc7U6jeGFmV9f20n8mYd16cv_MopArmXX909LCvH1xz59fjO8wahQ&amp;_nc_ht=scontent.fhhr1-2.fna&amp;oh=78ca9f95bc9177a4d46c134ddf7c4e54&amp;oe=5D65436A" style="border-radius: 50%; border: 0px; display: inline-block; height: 15px; margin-left: 3px; vertical-align: middle; width: 15px;" title="Seen by Shelley Hunter at 9:19 PM" /></span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
<div class="_1t_p clearfix" style="font-family: inherit; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">
<h5 aria-label="Darrell" class="_ih3 accessible_elem _-ne" style="clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; height: 1px; line-height: 1.28; margin: 0px 0px 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 0px 0px 12px; position: absolute; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; width: 1px;">
Darrell</h5>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="9:35 PM" data-tooltip-position="right" id="js_9j" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 351.398px; top: 818.136px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"><div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px 5px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="We were friends and that worked.

In February we crossed a line into something more. You sent pictures, I felt kind of pursued me a little (from my perspective) and practically blew up my phone non stop. Everytime I tried to back off a little, you said &quot;Go ahead, you ain't gonna find nothing better than this&quot;... And you worked your way into the place I'd been keeping protected. 

I actually became convinced there was more happening. I started drafting a courtship plan, I even crafted a plan to propose. 

You kept telling me how you wanted to attack my face.

From my perspective, you took a sharp 180* after the divorce. You needed space and needed to not be peed on. I got that. You even said I was 8 months ahead of you. You wanted to be &quot;just friends&quot;... I agreed for your sake but my heart never lined up with that decision.

Then you were talking apps and making out just for fun... And I understood, I did that too when I got single. In my own way.

Then you just straight dissappeared for a while and I lost my friend. I went to the dark place and all that comes with it.

We found a new place and I started to feel like I had you back.

Then Scott came into the picture.

Then he was over all the time.

Then you dissappeared again. All the texts and daily semi daily talk stopped.

Then you needed me, I thought, but turned around and went on a date when you'd just said he was causing you problems.

Now you gave away our night. You've generally only missed that because you fell asleep.

I've never once not sat here waiting on Sunday evenings. Not once. Except for the one time I told you ahead of time I had a conflicting schedule item.

.......


I'm feeling cast aside. Second best. Like the back-up friend... 

I fell for you... And then you backed off... Slowly, then abruptly.

.....

I am going to be okay, but frankly, I feel more like an ex boyfriend than a best friend.

I'll get over it.

I'll heal.

I'll be here for you.

I just don't know what any of that means right now, practically.

The hurt side says I'd rather you didn't come to visit because I don't think I could handle it.

So I'm going to be okay, but I'm not okay right now. I actually feel a little led on.

I will be here when you need me, but, I need to figure out what this new thing is supposed to look like. 

I can't be having &quot;date night&quot; on my schedule for &quot;just friends&quot;.

Please give careful prayer to what lines or boundaries you need too, and let me know.

I just need time to reset. I guess." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">We were friends and that worked.

In February we crossed a line into something more. You sent pictures, I felt kind of pursued me a little (from my perspective) and practically blew up my phone non stop. Everytime I tried to back off a little, you said "Go ahead, you ain't gonna find nothing better than this"... And you worked your way into the place I'd been keeping protected. 

I actually became convinced there was more happening. I started drafting a courtship plan, I even crafted a plan to propose. 

You kept telling me how you wanted to attack my face.

From my perspective, you took a sharp 180* after the divorce. You needed space and needed to not be peed on. I got that. You even said I was 8 months ahead of you. You wanted to be "just friends"... I agreed for your sake but my heart never lined up with that decision.

Then you were talking apps and making out just for fun... And I understood, I did that too when I got single. In my own way.

Then you just straight dissappeared for a while and I lost my friend. I went to the dark place and all that comes with it.

We found a new place and I started to feel like I had you back.

Then Scott came into the picture.

Then he was over all the time.

Then you dissappeared again. All the texts and daily semi daily talk stopped.

Then you needed me, I thought, but turned around and went on a date when you'd just said he was causing you problems.

Now you gave away our night. You've generally only missed that because you fell asleep.

I've never once not sat here waiting on Sunday evenings. Not once. Except for the one time I told you ahead of time I had a conflicting schedule item.

.......


I'm feeling cast aside. Second best. Like the back-up friend... 

I fell for you... And then you backed off... Slowly, then abruptly.

.....

I am going to be okay, but frankly, I feel more like an ex boyfriend than a best friend.

I'll get over it.

I'll heal.

I'll be here for you.

I just don't know what any of that means right now, practically.

The hurt side says I'd rather you didn't come to visit because I don't think I could handle it.

So I'm going to be okay, but I'm not okay right now. I actually feel a little led on.

I will be here when you need me, but, I need to figure out what this new thing is supposed to look like. 

I can't be having "date night" on my schedule for "just friends".

Please give careful prayer to what lines or boundaries you need too, and let me know.

I just need time to reset. I guess.</span></div>
</div>
<span class="_2her _9ah" style="background: none currentcolor; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid currentcolor; bottom: 1px; box-sizing: border-box; color: #0084ff; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; height: 10px; position: absolute; right: -15px; vertical-align: middle; width: 10px;" title="Delivered"><i aria-label="Delivered" aria-roledescription="Status icon" class="_57e_" role="img" style="border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-style: solid; border-width: 0px 0px 1px 1px; color: white; display: block; height: 1px; margin-left: 3px; margin-top: 4px; transform-origin: 0% 100%; transform: rotate(-45deg); width: 4px;"></i></span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
<div class="_1t_p clearfix" style="font-family: inherit; margin-bottom: 15px; position: relative; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_41ud" style="font-family: inherit; margin-left: 36px;">
<h5 aria-label="Darrell" class="_ih3 accessible_elem _-ne" style="clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; height: 1px; line-height: 1.28; margin: 0px 0px 1px; opacity: 0; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px 0px 0px 12px; position: absolute; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; width: 1px;">
Darrell</h5>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="9:38 PM" data-tooltip-position="right" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 1.3em 4px; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 174.966px; top: 15.2273px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"><div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px 5px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="I'm going to go cry now." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">I'm going to go cry now.</span></div>
</div>
<span class="_2her _9ah" style="background: none currentcolor; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid currentcolor; bottom: 1px; box-sizing: border-box; color: #0084ff; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; height: 10px; position: absolute; right: -15px; vertical-align: middle; width: 10px;" title="Delivered"><i aria-label="Delivered" aria-roledescription="Status icon" class="_57e_" role="img" style="border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-style: solid; border-width: 0px 0px 1px 1px; color: white; display: block; height: 1px; margin-left: 3px; margin-top: 4px; transform-origin: 0% 100%; transform: rotate(-45deg); width: 4px;"></i></span></div>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="9:39 PM" data-tooltip-position="right" id="js_8u" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 4px 4px 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 351.398px; top: 41.4091px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"><div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px 5px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="I never wanted to be burden to you, to be just another guy who wanted something. I don't think I am. I do think I'm a guy you pursued a little and then stopped... At least, from my side that's how it felt." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">I never wanted to be burden to you, to be just another guy who wanted something. I don't think I am. I do think I'm a guy you pursued a little and then stopped... At least, from my side that's how it felt.</span></div>
</div>
<span class="_2her _9ah" style="background: none currentcolor; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid currentcolor; bottom: 1px; box-sizing: border-box; color: #0084ff; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; height: 10px; position: absolute; right: -15px; vertical-align: middle; width: 10px;" title="Delivered"><i aria-label="Delivered" aria-roledescription="Status icon" class="_57e_" role="img" style="border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-style: solid; border-width: 0px 0px 1px 1px; color: white; display: block; height: 1px; margin-left: 3px; margin-top: 4px; transform-origin: 0% 100%; transform: rotate(-45deg); width: 4px;"></i></span></div>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="9:39 PM" data-tooltip-position="right" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 4px 4px 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 137.386px; top: 15.2273px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"><div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px 5px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="I love you, Shelley." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">I love you, Shelley.</span></div>
</div>
<span class="_2her _9ah" style="background: none currentcolor; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid currentcolor; bottom: 1px; box-sizing: border-box; color: #0084ff; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; height: 10px; position: absolute; right: -15px; vertical-align: middle; width: 10px;" title="Delivered"><i aria-label="Delivered" aria-roledescription="Status icon" class="_57e_" role="img" style="border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-style: solid; border-width: 0px 0px 1px 1px; color: white; display: block; height: 1px; margin-left: 3px; margin-top: 4px; transform-origin: 0% 100%; transform: rotate(-45deg); width: 4px;"></i></span></div>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="9:40 PM" data-tooltip-position="right" id="js_7u" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 4px 4px 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 351.398px; top: 50.1364px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"><div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px 5px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="I said those words and meant them. I still do. If I'm not who God has for you then I will pray for that guy. My emotions will get in line later, but I choose to will what's best for you and not just what makes me feel better." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">I said those words and meant them. I still do. If I'm not who God has for you then I will pray for that guy. My emotions will get in line later, but I choose to will what's best for you and not just what makes me feel better.</span></div>
</div>
<span class="_2her _9ah" style="background: none currentcolor; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid currentcolor; bottom: 1px; box-sizing: border-box; color: #0084ff; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; height: 10px; position: absolute; right: -15px; vertical-align: middle; width: 10px;" title="Delivered"><i aria-label="Delivered" aria-roledescription="Status icon" class="_57e_" role="img" style="border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-style: solid; border-width: 0px 0px 1px 1px; color: white; display: block; height: 1px; margin-left: 3px; margin-top: 4px; transform-origin: 0% 100%; transform: rotate(-45deg); width: 4px;"></i></span></div>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="9:40 PM" data-tooltip-position="right" id="js_7d" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 4px 4px 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 178.193px; top: 15.2273px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"><div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px 5px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="I think that's everything..." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">I think that's everything...</span></div>
</div>
<span class="_2her _9ah" style="background: none currentcolor; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid currentcolor; bottom: 1px; box-sizing: border-box; color: #0084ff; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; height: 10px; position: absolute; right: -15px; vertical-align: middle; width: 10px;" title="Delivered"><i aria-label="Delivered" aria-roledescription="Status icon" class="_57e_" role="img" style="border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-style: solid; border-width: 0px 0px 1px 1px; color: white; display: block; height: 1px; margin-left: 3px; margin-top: 4px; transform-origin: 0% 100%; transform: rotate(-45deg); width: 4px;"></i></span></div>
<div class="clearfix _o46 _3erg _3i_m _nd_ direction_ltr text_align_ltr" style="direction: ltr; font-family: inherit; position: relative; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap; zoom: 1;">
<div class="_3058 _ui9 _hh7 _6ybn _s1- _52mr _43by _3oh-" data-hover="tooltip" data-tooltip-content="9:41 PM" data-tooltip-position="right" id="js_5x" style="background-color: #0099ff; border-radius: 1.3em 4px 1.3em 1.3em; box-sizing: content-box; clear: right; color: white; float: right; font-family: inherit; margin: 1px 0px; max-width: 55%; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; padding: 6px 12px 7px; position: relative; user-select: text;">
<span class="_40fu" data-hover="none" style="direction: ltr; float: right; font-family: inherit;"><span class="_1z_2 _2u_d" style="align-items: center; display: flex; flex-direction: row-reverse; font-family: inherit; position: absolute; right: 351.398px; top: 32.6818px; transform: translate(-10%, -50%); width: 100px;"><div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px 5px;">
</div>
<div style="font-family: inherit;">
</div>
</span></span><div aria-label="I'm not going anywhere, but, I'm not going to be trying so hard to get your attention like I have been. I'm still a text or call away if you need me." class="_aok" style="font-family: inherit; outline: none;" tabindex="0">
<span class="_3oh- _58nk" style="font-family: inherit; user-select: text;">I'm not going anywhere, but, I'm not going to be trying so hard to get your attention like I have been. I'm still a text or call away if you need me.</span></div>
</div>
<span class="_2her _9ah" style="background: none currentcolor; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid currentcolor; bottom: 1px; box-sizing: border-box; color: #0084ff; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; height: 10px; position: absolute; right: -15px; vertical-align: middle; width: 10px;" title="Delivered"><i aria-label="Delivered" aria-roledescription="Status icon" class="_57e_" role="img" style="border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-style: solid; border-width: 0px 0px 1px 1px; color: white; display: block; height: 1px; margin-left: 3px; margin-top: 4px; transform-origin: 0% 100%; transform: rotate(-45deg); width: 4px;"></i></span></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="_4gd0" style="background: white; font-family: inherit;">
<div class="clearfix _17pz" style="font-family: inherit; margin: 0px; zoom: 1;">
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="_4u-f" style="background: transparent; bottom: 0px; font-family: inherit; left: 0px; position: absolute; right: 0px; top: 0px; z-index: -1;">
</div>
</div>

<div aria-autocomplete="list" aria-controls="js_2n" aria-describedby="js_1" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Type a message..." class="notranslate _5rpu" contenteditable="true" role="combobox" spellcheck="false" style="-webkit-user-modify: read-write-plaintext-only; font-family: inherit; height: inherit; outline: none; overflow-wrap: break-word; text-align: initial; user-select: text; white-space: pre-wrap;" tabindex="0">
<div data-contents="true" style="font-family: inherit;">
<div class="" data-block="true" data-editor="4f858" data-offset-key="7vbqg-0-0" style="font-family: inherit;">

</div>
</div>
<div class="_4rv4" style="align-items: flex-end; display: flex; font-family: inherit; justify-content: space-between; line-height: 0; padding: 8px 0px;">
<ul class="_39bj" style="display: flex; list-style-type: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<li class="_39bk" style="display: inline-block; margin-right: 5px; vertical-align: top;"><form action="https://upload.facebook.com/ajax/mercury/upload.php" class="_vzk _4uld" method="post" style="cursor: pointer; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;" title="Add files">
<div class="_m _4q60 _3rzn _6a" data-testid="photo_upload_button" style="display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; overflow: hidden; position: relative;">
<span class="_4q61 _5f0v _509v _30yy _7hi7 _260u" style="color: inherit; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; height: 32px; outline: none; padding: 0px; transition: opacity 0.2s ease 0s; vertical-align: top; width: 32px;"><i alt="Camera" class="_5vn8" style="background-image: url(&quot;/rsrc.php/v3/yJ/r/Z4Zi9BgTxU9.png&quot;); background-position: 0px -272px; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: 34px 2420px; display: block; height: 32px; width: 32px;"></i><input accept="*" class="_260t _n _2__f _4e5e" data-testid="photo_input" multiple="" name="attachment[]" style="background-color: white; bottom: 0px; color: #1c1e21; cursor: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-size: 1000px !important; height: 300px; margin: 0px; opacity: 0; padding: 0px; position: absolute; right: 0px;" title="Add files" type="file" /></span></div>
</form>
</li>
<li style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: top;"><a class="_30yy _4rv6 _39bk" href="https://www.facebook.com/messages/t/100006410115712#" role="button" style="background-image: url(&quot;/rsrc.php/v3/yJ/r/Z4Zi9BgTxU9.png&quot;); background-position: 0px -340px; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: 34px 2420px; color: #385898; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; height: 32px; margin-right: 5px; opacity: 0.3; outline: none; padding: 0px; text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 0.2s ease 0s; vertical-align: top; width: 32px;"></a></li>
<li style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: top;"><span style="font-family: inherit;"><a class="_30yy _yht _39bk" href="https://www.facebook.com/messages/t/100006410115712#" role="button" style="background-image: url(&quot;/rsrc.php/v3/yJ/r/Z4Zi9BgTxU9.png&quot;); background-position: 0px -102px; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: 34px 2420px; color: #385898; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; font-family: inherit; height: 32px; margin-right: 5px; outline: none; padding: 0px; text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 0.2s ease 0s; vertical-align: top; width: 32px;" title="Choose a gif"></a></span></li>
